inputs.text:
macro close-up inspection photo of a stainless steel {0.20::scissors|0.20::forceps|0.20::tongs|0.20::hammer|0.10::cube|0.10::sphere},
single object only, top view, object directly below camera, object centered in frame with visible margins on all sides, entire object visible without cropping,

material: stainless steel, realistic brushed/matt steel

water-stain / rinse residue ON THE METAL SURFACE ONLY (not liquid), coalesced dried droplet marks forming a continuous "map-like" cellular pattern (irregular polygonal patches and soft boundaries), uneven translucent haze with patchy islands, low contrast neutral-gray with only a very slight brown tint, slight dulling of brushed steel sheen, subtle tide marks and gradients; NOT circular rings, NOT coffee-ring outlines, NOT isolated dots, NOT chalky white crust, NOT mineral scale, no corrosion pits, no rust; background/tabletop perfectly clean and dry, no wet patches, puddles, spills, or stains on the background,
distribution: global across object, {0.50::large continuous fields covering most surfaces|0.30::two to three big irregular patches with soft transitions|0.20::coverage heavier along one side/edge with gentle gradient}

lighting: {blueish|white|studio}, diffused softbox
sharp focus, realistic camera look, mild sensor noise, slight compression artifacts,

background: plain white backdrop,
instrument is floating over the backdrop,
background is perfectly clean, flat color, no texture, no pattern, no shadows, no objects,
no vignette, no spotlight, no fisheye, no dark corners
